## How I tested it

<!--
Cruxwire has no automated test suite, so manual verification matters. Say how you
ran it (Docker, or `python server.py` with the env from CONTRIBUTING.md), which
flow you exercised, and what you observed working.

## Checklist

- [ ] Keeps Cruxwire dependency-free (Python stdlib + vanilla JS only; no pip/npm deps).
- [ ] Stays single-container and local-first (no new external services).
- [ ] Updated the docs (README / TUNING.md) if behaviour or config changed.
- [ ] No secrets, internal hostnames, or personal data in the diff.
